title: SCP: Internals
description: SCP Mod for Forge 1.20.1! [Cancelled + Source Code Released]
body:
Before this mod was cancelled completely, I wanted it to be a high-quality SCP mod for newer versions of Minecraft, 1.20.1 (Versus Lockdown's version of 1.12.2).

However, as of new light, I have cancelled the project due to loss of interest, and now competition.

The mod is licensed under the **MIT License** and therefore can be used in any appropriate matter in which the user credits me, the developer. The **source code is available for use as well** and can be tweaked in any appropriate manner.

# 100% Working As Intended:

-Doors

-Button Pads

-Keycards

-Keycard Readers

-Decorative Blocks

-Lights

-More blocks


# Not Working As Intended:

-Blast Door
